caption:
Six logins to run one shop.

CRM in one tab. Texting in another. Booking on a third app. Review requests you forget to send. Ad numbers sitting in a spreadsheet nobody opens.

Each gap between those apps is where a lead goes cold.

The Black Arrow platform puts all of it under one login: CRM, two-way texting, booking, missed-call text-back, review collection, win-backs, and revenue reporting that shows where the money came from.

Try it free for 14 days. No card. Cancel anytime.

Refer another business owner. When they subscribe, you both get a free month. The platform tracks it, no spreadsheet needed.

DM TRIAL

#ServiceBusiness #SmallBusinessGrowth #CRM #LeadFollowUp #BusinessAutomation
rationale: Carousels lead saves and depth for educational offer content. Tool sprawl is a real, specific pain point that frames the platform's unified feature set and referral offer without hype.
